====Pokémon Adventures====
[[File:Diamond Adventures.png|thumb|100px|Lucas's Pokémon Adventures counterpart, Diamond]]
{{main|Diamond (Adventures)}}
Diamond from [[Pokémon Adventures]] is modeled after Lucas. Together with his friend {{adv|Pearl}}, they form an aspiring {{wp|manzai}} comedy duo. He is a big glutton with a love for the [[Proteam Omega]] TV show.
